name: IBM Research
notes: Primary institutional hub for CHRONOS, Watson/KGQA, trustworthy AI, causal KG, semantic table, and alignment records.

name: Cycorp
notes: Primary institutional hub for Cyc commonsense and knowledge acquisition lineage. Rights and licensing require review.

name: Carnegie Mellon University
notes: Relevant to ACT-R, cognitive architecture background, and historical AI lineage; not yet source-normalized in corpus.

name: University of Michigan
notes: Relevant to Soar lineage; not yet source-normalized in corpus.

name: W3C
notes: Relevant to PROV-O, RDF, and semantic-web substrate patterns.

name: AAAI
notes: Venue and program context for CHRONOS, Cyc acquisition, AI Explainability 360, and related works.

name: Association for Computational Linguistics
notes: Venue context for Conceptual Diagnostics and NLP/KGQA lineage.

name: IEEE
notes: Venue context for Alignment Studio and trustworthy AI systems papers.

name: International Semantic Web Conference
notes: Semantic Web, causal KG, and event-sequence knowledge lineage.

name: Dagstuhl / TGDK
notes: TGDK / graph data and knowledge benchmark lineage.

name: Zenodo
notes: Artifact host for table benchmark datasets and generator artifacts.
